articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: The App Store is booming again, and AI may be why - TechCrunch
articles.description: New data from Appfigures shows a swell of new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools could be fueling a mobile software boom.
articles.content:
Everyone said AI would kill apps. Instead, new app launches are soaring.
According to a new analysis from market intelligence provider Appfigures, worldwide app releases in the first quarter of 2026… [+3603 chars]

articles.title: Microsoft Expands Xbox Mode to Windows Laptops, PCs, and Tablets - TechPowerUp
articles.description: We recently reported on Microsoft renaming the Xbox Full-Screen Experience to Xbox mode and subsequently updating the gaming UI with new display options for gaming handhelds. Most recently, though, Microsoft has announced that it will be bringing that console…
